user.title: Grundfos Alpha2 Go
user.description:
Select your pump or enter its Bluetooth address manually.

To pair the pump, press the connectivity button (Wi-Fi symbol) until the blue LED blinks.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Grundfos Alpha2 Go Detected
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Add **{name}** ({address})?

Make sure the pump is paired to this Home Assistant instance (connectivity button).

abort.no_devices_found: No Grundfos pump found. Check Bluetooth and range.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the pump. Make sure it is powered and within Bluetooth range.
